---
title: "Lecture 11: Bootstrap Framework"
subtitle: "{{< meta course.number >}} - {{< meta course.title >}}"
author: "{{< meta instructor.name >}}"
date: "February 11, 2026"
code-annotations: below
format: 
  revealjs:
    slide-number: true
    code-link: true
    highlight-style: a11y
    chalkboard: true
    transition: slide
    transition-speed: default
    code-line-numbers: true
    code-overflow: wrap
    theme: 
      - ../course-slides-styles.scss
---

## {#title-slide data-menu-title="Title Slide" background="#053660"}

<div class="custom-title">
[Lecture 11]{.baby-blue-text}
</div>

<div class="custom-subtitle">
[Bootstrap Framework]{.white-text}
</div>

<div class="custom-subtitle3">
Week 3 | Unit II: CSS Styling & JavaScript<br>
{{< meta course.number >}} - {{< meta course.title >}}<br>
{{< meta instructor.name >}}, {{< meta instructor.title >}}
</div>

---

## {data-menu-title="Learning Objectives"}

[Learning Objectives]{.slide-title}

<hr>

::: {.incremental .body-text-m}
- Understand what Bootstrap is and why it's useful
- Include Bootstrap in your projects
- Use Bootstrap's grid system
- Work with Bootstrap components (buttons, cards, navbar)
- Customize Bootstrap styling
- Build responsive websites quickly
:::

::: {.notes}
Bootstrap is the world's most popular web framework. It saves time and ensures professional results.
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="What is Bootstrap?"}}

[Bootstrap: The Web Framework]{.slide-title}

<hr>

::: {.body-text-m}
::: {.fragment}
Bootstrap is a **CSS framework** for building responsive websites
:::
::: {.fragment}
- Pre-built CSS classes and components
:::
::: {.fragment}
- Professional grid system
:::
::: {.fragment}
- Mobile-first responsive design
:::
::: {.fragment}
- JavaScript components included
:::
:::

::: {.fragment}
**Analogy:** If CSS is LEGO blocks, Bootstrap gives you pre-made LEGO structures
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="Why Use Bootstrap?"}}

[Benefits of Bootstrap]{.slide-title}

<hr>

::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
[**Saves Time**]{.teal-text}

- Pre-built components
- Don't write CSS from scratch
- Includes responsive grid
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
[**Professional Results**]{.teal-text}

- Consistent design
- Mobile responsive
- Works across browsers
:::
:::

. . .

::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
[**Easy to Learn**]{.teal-text}

- Straightforward class names
- Good documentation
- Large community
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
[**Customizable**]{.teal-text}

- Override default styles
- Theming available
- Flexible components
:::
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="Including Bootstrap"}}

[How to Include Bootstrap]{.slide-title}

<hr>

Add to your HTML `<head>`:

```{.html code-line-numbers="|1|2"}
<!-- Bootstrap CSS -->
<link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.0/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">

<!-- Bootstrap JS (at end of body) -->
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.0/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js"></script>
```

::: {.fragment}
Complete template:

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
    <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.0/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
    <title>My Site</title>
</head>
<body>
    <!-- Content here -->
</body>
</html>
```
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="Grid System"}}

[Bootstrap Grid System]{.slide-title}

<hr>

Organize content in 12 columns:

```{.html code-line-numbers="|1|2-4|5"}
<div class="container">
    <div class="row">
        <div class="col-6">Left (6 columns)</div>
        <div class="col-6">Right (6 columns)</div>
    </div>
</div>
```

**What it means:**
- `container`: Fixed-width wrapper
- `row`: Horizontal grouping
- `col-*`: Column size (1-12)

---

## {data-menu-title="Responsive Columns"}}

[Responsive Grid Breakpoints]{.slide-title}

<hr>

Change layout based on screen size:

```{.html code-line-numbers="|1-3"}
<div class="row">
    <!-- 12 cols on mobile, 6 on tablet, 4 on desktop -->
    <div class="col-12 col-md-6 col-lg-4">Content</div>
</div>
```

**Breakpoints:**
- `col-*`: Extra small (< 576px)
- `col-sm-*`: Small (≥ 576px)
- `col-md-*`: Medium (≥ 768px)
- `col-lg-*`: Large (≥ 992px)
- `col-xl-*`: Extra large (≥ 1200px)

---

## {data-menu-title="Bootstrap Buttons"}}

[Bootstrap Button Component]{.slide-title}

<hr>

Pre-styled buttons with classes:

```{.html code-line-numbers="|1|2|3|4|5"}
<button class="btn btn-primary">Primary</button>
<button class="btn btn-secondary">Secondary</button>
<button class="btn btn-danger">Delete</button>
<button class="btn btn-success">Save</button>
<button class="btn btn-outline-primary">Outline</button>
```

**Button sizes:**
```html
<button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm">Small</button>
<button class="btn btn-primary btn-lg">Large</button>
```

---

## {data-menu-title="Bootstrap Cards"}}

[Bootstrap Card Component]{.slide-title}

<hr>

Flexible content container:

```{.html code-line-numbers="|1|2-3|4-5|6"}
<div class="card" style="width: 300px;">
    <img class="card-img-top" src="image.jpg" alt="Card">
    <div class="card-body">
        <h5 class="card-title">Card Title</h5>
        <p class="card-text">Card description</p>
        <a href="#" class="btn btn-primary">Learn More</a>
    </div>
</div>
```

---

## {data-menu-title="Bootstrap Navbar"}}

[Bootstrap Navbar Component]{.slide-title}

<hr>

Professional navigation bar:

```{.html code-line-numbers="|1|2-3|4-6|7"}
<nav class="navbar navbar-expand-lg navbar-dark bg-dark">
    <div class="container">
        <a class="navbar-brand" href="#">MyBrand</a>
        <button class="navbar-toggler" type="button">Menu</button>
        <div class="navbar-collapse">
            <ul class="navbar-nav ms-auto">
                <li class="nav-item"><a class="nav-link" href="#">Home</a></li>
                <li class="nav-item"><a class="nav-link" href="#">About</a></li>
            </ul>
        </div>
    </div>
</nav>
```

::: {.fragment .body-text-m .center-text .topbr}
[Automatically becomes mobile hamburger menu!]{.magenta-text}
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="Bootstrap Alert"}}

[Alert Component]{.slide-title}

<hr>

Display messages to users:

```{.html code-line-numbers="|1|2|3|4"}
<div class="alert alert-success">Success message</div>
<div class="alert alert-danger">Danger message</div>
<div class="alert alert-warning">Warning message</div>
<div class="alert alert-info">Information</div>
```

**With close button:**
```html
<div class="alert alert-success alert-dismissible">
    Success!
    <button type="button" class="btn-close"></button>
</div>
```

---

## {data-menu-title="Bootstrap Forms"}}

[Bootstrap Form Styling]{.slide-title}

<hr>

Beautifully styled form inputs:

```{.html code-line-numbers="|1-3|4-6|7-9"}
<form>
    <div class="mb-3">
        <label class="form-label">Email</label>
        <input type="email" class="form-control">
    </div>
    <div class="mb-3">
        <label class="form-label">Password</label>
        <input type="password" class="form-control">
    </div>
    <button class="btn btn-primary">Login</button>
</form>
```

---

## {data-menu-title="Complete Example"}}

[Complete Bootstrap Page Example]{.slide-title}

<hr>

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
    <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.0/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
    <title>Portfolio</title>
</head>
<body>
    <!-- Navbar -->
    <nav class="navbar navbar-dark bg-dark">
        <div class="container">
            <a class="navbar-brand">My Portfolio</a>
        </div>
    </nav>

    <!-- Main Content -->
    <main class="container my-5">
        <div class="row">
            <div class="col-md-4">
                <div class="card">
                    <img class="card-img-top" src="project.jpg">
                    <div class="card-body">
                        <h5 class="card-title">Project 1</h5>
                        <button class="btn btn-primary">View</button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </main>

    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.0/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js"></script>
</body>
</html>
```

---

## {data-menu-title="Resources"}}

[Resources & References]{.slide-title}

<hr>

::: {.body-text-m}
- [Bootstrap Official Docs](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/)
- [Bootstrap Components](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.3/components/)
- [Bootstrap Grid](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.3/layout/grid/)
- [Course content: Week 3](/content/week-03.qmd)
:::

---

## {#end-slide data-menu-title="End Slide" background="#053660"}

<div class="page-center">
<div class="custom-subtitle">
[Questions?]{.white-text}
</div>
<div class="custom-subtitle3">
Next: Lecture 12 - JavaScript Variables & Data Types
</div>
</div>
